meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Voting Village - Reflections on TTBR & Everest - Bowen, Blaze, Clark, Hoke, Mulligan
meta.description: This panel features several researchers that were central to the TTBR as well as the similar Ohio EVEREST Study and will delve further into the conduct of those studies, and how they may inform election security research today.
